title: MCDA - Lightning Unlimited
description: This Datapack Adds the Heros armor from MCDA to the list of armors that can have 8 enchants in Prominence II
body:
This Datapack Adds the tag limit_8 to Heros Armor, as it is the only class armor missing it.

 

Whilst this Datapack does nothing on its own, there really isnt any point in using this in your own custom pack as this is specifically tailored to be used in Prominence II until this oversight is fixed in one way or another in some other way shape or form.
